title: Saturn: Legacy Dreams
body:
**Saturn Legacy Dreams** completely overhauls the vanilla experience, adding tons of new content without overheating your device! This modpack aims to be fluid and smooth on almost every PC (ALTHOUGH, IT NEEDS AT LEAST **4GB OF RAM**).

Please note that this modpack is inspired by the **Perfection** modpack made by Shyoshi! 

![Modpack Title decor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9151a63bf58deca06372d86544fc8c7744389b1d.png)
___

## What exactly does SLD add?

EXPLORING: New biomes in the overworld (including caves), nether, and end. Plus structures in each dimension to loot, giving that sweet feeling of finding something valuable.

CREATURES: Pets, monsters, neutral fellows and more to discover.

COMBAT: Includes more weapons to defend yourself against the world’s dangers!

DIFFICULTY: Enhances the behavior of mobs, adds brand new bosses to defeat, seasons that affect crop growth, and of course, thirst and body temperature.

FOOD & DRINKS: Be a chef, farmer, cheesemaker, or brewer... you choose!

VISUALS: Tired of the old Minecraft look? It’s your lucky day! New particles, optimized rain, health bars, damage indicators, and a few more extras. 

Not running smoothly on your PC!? Try the lite version or these settings:

- Mipmap level: 0  
- Chunk render: 5–8  
- Vanilla clouds (or deactivate them)  
- FPS Limit: 40–50  

Shaders are HEAVILY recommended! You have a trio to choose from: Potato Shaders, MakeUp Ultrafast, and Miniature Shader.  

Note: Miniature Shader is the only one available on the lite version, but they still look great, adding shadows and vanilla-like lighting.

___
